sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْجَاحِظُ أَدِيبًا مَشْهُورًا فِي الْعَصْرِ الْعَبَّاسِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Al-Jahiz je bio poznati književnik u abasidskom periodu.
sentences.translationEn: Al-Jahiz was a famous writer in the Abbasid era.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ عَنِ الْبُخَلَاءِ وَالْحَيَوَانَاتِ وَأَخْلَاقِ النَّاسِ بِذَكَاءٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Pisao je o škrticama, životinjama i moralu ljudi sa velikom inteligencijom.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote about misers, animals, and people's morals with great intelligence.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يُحِبُّ الْكُتُبَ كَثِيرًا وَيَقْضِي وَقْتَهُ فِي الْمَكْتَبَاتِ لِلْبَحْثِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogo je volio knjige i provodio je vrijeme u bibliotekama istražujući.
sentences.translationEn: He loved books very much and spent his time in libraries researching.

sentences.arabic: لُغَتُهُ قَوِيَّةٌ وَلَكِنَّهَا مَفْهُومَةٌ لِمَنْ يَدْرُسُ الْعَرَبِيَّةَ بِجِدٍّ.
sentences.translation: Njegov jezik je snažan, ali razumljiv onome ko ozbiljno uči arapski.
sentences.translationEn: His language is strong but understandable for those who study Arabic seriously.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَبِرُ النَّاسُ كُتُبَهُ مَصْدَرًا لِلْعِلْمِ وَالثَّقَافَةِ وَالْمُتْعَةِ أَيْضًا.
sentences.translation: Ljudi smatraju njegove knjige izvorom znanja, kulture, ali i zabave.
sentences.translationEn: People consider his books a source of knowledge, culture, and enjoyment as well.
